title: II. Management Sciences Symposium: Sustainability and Green Transition - Collaborations
content:
II. Management Sciences Symposium: Sustainability and Green Transition - Collaborations

Our symposium themed Sustainability and Green Transformation organized by Istanbul Esenyurt University Faculty of Business and Management Sciences in collaboration with;

Istanbul Bilgi University Environment, Energy and Sustainability Center,

Istanbul Kültür University Sustainable Development Center, and

Istanbul Gedik University Sustainability Office.

This content was updated on 03/02/2025.
